Homework11

Question 1

flight_freq<-nycflights13::flights %>% group_by(origin, dest) %>%
  summarize(num_flights = n(), .groups = "drop")

head(flight_freq) %>% knitr::kable()
origin dest num_flights
EWR ALB 439
EWR ANC 8
EWR ATL 5022
EWR AUS 968
EWR AVL 265
EWR BDL 443

1

Question 2

flight_lat_long<-flight_freq %>% left_join(airports %>% select(faa, lat, lon), join_by(origin==faa)) %>%
  rename(origin_lat = lat, origin_lon = lon) %>%
  relocate(origin_lat, origin_lon, .after = origin)

head(flight_lat_long) %>% knitr::kable()
origin origin_lat origin_lon dest num_flights
EWR 40.6925 -74.16867 ALB 439
EWR 40.6925 -74.16867 ANC 8
EWR 40.6925 -74.16867 ATL 5022
EWR 40.6925 -74.16867 AUS 968
EWR 40.6925 -74.16867 AVL 265
EWR 40.6925 -74.16867 BDL 443

2

Question 3

ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(
    data = map_data("state"), 
    mapping = aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
    fill = NA, 
    color = "gray"
  ) +
  coord_fixed(1.3) +
  labs(title = "Map of Continental United States",
       x = "Longitude", 
       y = "Latitude")

3

Question 4

plot_data<-flight_freq %>%
  left_join(airports %>% select(faa, lat, lon), join_by(origin == faa)) %>%
  rename(orig_lat = lat, orig_lon = lon) %>%
  left_join(airports %>% select(faa, lat, lon), join_by(dest == faa)) %>%
  rename(dest_lat = lat, dest_lon = lon) %>% drop_na(orig_lat, orig_lon, dest_lat, dest_lon)

ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(
    data = map_data("state"), 
    mapping = aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
    fill = NA, 
    color = "gray"
  )+geom_segment(
    data = plot_data, 
    mapping = aes(
      x = orig_lon, 
      y = orig_lat, 
      xend = dest_lon, 
      yend = dest_lat, 
      alpha = num_flights
    ))+coord_fixed(1.3)+
  labs(
    title="Flights in the United States",
    alpha="Flights"
  )

4

Question 5

flight_freq_mainland <- plot_data %>%
  filter(
    dest_lon > -125, dest_lon < -66,
    dest_lat > 24 ,dest_lat < 50
  )
ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(
    data = map_data("state"), 
    mapping = aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
    fill = NA, 
    color = "gray"
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = flight_freq_mainland, 
    mapping = aes(
      x = orig_lon, 
      y = orig_lat, 
      xend = dest_lon, 
      yend = dest_lat, 
      alpha = num_flights
    )
  ) +
  coord_fixed(1.3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Flight Paths Continental US Only",
    alpha = "Flights"
  )

5
